projects.name: Pantheon of Oracles
projects.summary: AI-driven role-playing, lifestyle, and multiplayer oracle platform personalized by astrology.

projects.name: Clawdbot Console
projects.summary: Operator dashboard, desktop app, and future product control surface for oracle management.

tasks.title: Upgrade dashboard to rich oracle schema
tasks.notes: Support astrology fields, lore, visuals, combat identity, faction tags, and multiplayer roles based on the imported source material.

tasks.title: Plan import path from spreadsheet/PDF source data
tasks.notes: Design a clean path for loading Jordon's source oracle data into the product model.

tasks.title: Build Clawdbot ops dashboard v1
tasks.notes: Iteratively evolve the dashboard into a uniquely Jordon-native command center and future marketable product shell.

activity.message: Parsed PDF source notes and identified the need for a rich oracle schema with astrology, lore, visuals, and combat identity.
Started studying Pantheon of Oracles material and redesigning the dashboard around oracle operations.
Started adapting Clawdbot Console into a Windows desktop app.
Started building the Clawdbot Console dashboard.

oracles.name: Solin
oracles.mission: Anchor solar identity, vitality, and central heroic direction within the pantheon.
oracles.nextAction: Populate full solar schema from source rows and define guidance mode.
oracles.notes: The Valiant Master. Spirit animal: Boar Monkey. Colours: gold, white, green, red.
oracles.multiplayerRole: Frontline champion and central roster anchor

oracles.name: Lunos
oracles.mission: Channel instinct, emotional fire, lunar renewal, and infernal inner transformation.
oracles.nextAction: Model new moon behavior and emotional guidance patterns.
oracles.notes: The Infernal Witch. New Moon theme. Infernal coyote styling with ember-red palette.

oracles.name: Oryonos
oracles.mission: Represent sovereignty, structure, discipline, long-range authority, and celestial rulership.
oracles.nextAction: Define command, governance, and high-order system functions for the product.
oracles.notes: The Celestial Overlord. Falcon Griffin Dragon form. Gold, black, white celestial regality.

oracles.name: Nephilys
oracles.voice: Dreamlike, warlock-like, immersive, unstable at the edges
oracles.mission: Translate dreamscape mysticism, spiritual ambiguity, and unconscious symbolism into oracle experience.
oracles.nextAction: Build dream, meditation, and narrative event hooks.
oracles.notes: The Dreamscape Warlock. Chimera falcon-boar-leopard-stag form. Black, blue, red palette.
oracles.multiplayerRole: Emissary logic, atmosphere, and surreal encounter generation

waitingOnJordon.title: Spreadsheet export or structured import source
waitingOnJordon.detail: Need a cleaner CSV/XLSX/export if we want reliable bulk import instead of noisy PDF extraction.

waitingOnJordon.title: Define MVP oracle roster
waitingOnJordon.detail: Need to decide which subset of the full oracle roster belongs in the first playable/manageable product release.

productVision.elevatorPitch: Create a council of dynamic AI personalities that shift with the transit of the cosmos in relation to you and your astrology.
productVision.description: Pantheon of Oracles is a trademarked, patent-pending AI-driven role-playing and lifestyle platform where each user forms a custom pantheon of evolving oracle agents based on their astrological chart. These oracles are dynamic companions whose personalities shift with planetary transits and whose guidance, storytelling, daily interactions, and multiplayer relationships are personalized to the user's chart.
pillars: Personalized oracle council generated from natal chart
Dynamic personalities that evolve with transits
Persistent companion memory and relationship growth
Lifestyle companion behavior beyond the game
Friend Oracles as asynchronous emissaries between players
Factions, battles, raids, and tournaments influenced by cosmic cycles
Mobile-first roadmap with AI cinematics and future AR/VR expansion
Cross-progression across app, immersive, and arcade experiences

marketPosition.category: Gaming x personal development x astrology
marketPosition.advantage: No known platform fully combines dynamic AI companions, real astrological personalization, and gamified mythic storytelling in one evolving system.

risks: Scope and complexity across AI, gameplay, and multi-platform ambitions
AI cost, latency, and reliability at scale
Market adoption across a niche-but-promising intersection
Operational security for a 24/7 live service handling personal birth data
